title: Wandrous
description: A magic inspired on Noita's spell system, create wands, mix modifiers, make cool spells!
body:
![wandrous banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b2df0838ec01f6450c4dc30151036cfb71f3956.png)
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/A0A0ZB5WU)
### Wandrous is an magic mod inspired by Noita's Spell System 
### Tinker with wands, Mix Modifiers, Create Unique Spells!

# Features

Find randonly generated wands with unique looks, names and stats

Mix and match the more than 90 spells available with a lot of variety:

- Projectiles
- Projectile Movers
- Static Projectiles
- Spell Status Modifiers
- Spell Property Modifiers
- Buffs
- Debuffs
- Summons and More

Create cool looking builds with new building blocks for decoration

Explore dungeons with interesting rewards, like wands, and maybe even some powerful spells


Be rewarded with powerful spells by killing vanilla bosses and boss-like monsters, like the Wither and the Warden.

Encounter new spells in Ancient Cities, Villages and Desert Temples

Craft your own spells by using the Glyph Projectors and the Arcane Inscriber
